title: Contact Charlie - Charlie Maynard MP
headings: h3: Contact details for Charlie Maynard MP:
h2: Potholes, fly-tipping or issues in your area?
h3: Report potholes, missed bin collections, abandoned vehicles, fly-tipping, graffiti, dog fouling and other issues in your area with FixMyStreet
h2: Need advice on an issue?
h3: You can find written advice guides on a range of issues, from debt to housing, from Citizens Advice.
h2: Need support from the Council?
h3: West Oxfordshire and Vale of White Horse councils cover many local issues, from bin collections to climate change.
h2: Sign up for email updates...
text_excerpt: Contact Charlie - Charlie Maynard MP Skip to main content Charlie Maynard MP Meet Charlie Contact Charlie Charlie's Campaigns Volunteer News Donate Join Donate Join Charlie's Campaigns Rebuilding Our Railway Clean Water and Fair Bills Backing Local Farmers Improving Local Healthcare Supporting Our Highstreets Cost of Living Crisis District Council Elections 2026 News Subscribe Contact Charlie & His Team Charlie Maynard is your MP for the Witney Constituency, including Witney, Carterton, Faringdon, Burford & surrounding villages. Charlie is working for you all year round, not just at election time. Contact details for Charlie Maynard MP: 📧 charlie.maynard.mp@parliament.uk 📞 01993 463701 📫 Westminster Office: House of Commons, London, SW1A0AA 📫 Constituency Office: Elmfield House, New Yatt Road, Witney, OX28 1PB Follow Charlie: Facebook: charliemaynardliberaldemocrat Twitter/X: cammaynard Instagram: charliemaynard27 YouTube: CharlieMaynard-LD Helpful contacts Other sources of help and support. Potholes, fly-tipping or issues in your area?
